title: TaskLedgerEntry
description: Entry schema for task-ledger.ndjson — an append-only NDJSON ledger recording task lifecycle events and produced/consumed facts. Each line is a single JSON object. See docs/ai-native/task-ledger-schema.md for field-level documentation.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Current is 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

taskId.description: Unique identifier for the worker task, matching the heartbeat taskId and worker-telemetry taskId.

eventType.description: Dot-namespaced event type. task.* for lifecycle, fact.* for fact tracking, validation.* for command outcomes, gate.* for gate decisions.

recordedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this event was recorded.

issueNumber.description: GitHub issue number this task targets, if applicable.

prNumber.description: GitHub pull request number produced by this task, if applicable.

branch.description: Git branch or worktree name for the task.

taskType.description: Type of task from the task contract.

actorRole.description: Role that performed the work, from the task contract rolePacket.

pmPhase.description: Wave or phase identifier for aggregating events across a planning cycle.

severity.description: Severity of the event. info for normal lifecycle, warning for non-critical issues, error for failures, critical for data-loss or security risk.

factId.description: Unique identifier for the produced fact (e.g. 'fact:prisma-schema:User', 'fact:api:GET /users').

description.description: Human-readable description of what the fact asserts.

confidence.description: Confidence level: definite = guaranteed, likely = expected but not certain, conditional = depends on runtime findings.

produced.description: Facts produced by this event. Downstream tasks can declare these in their dependsOnFacts.

factId.description: Unique identifier for the consumed fact.

source.description: Where this fact was originally produced (issue number, PR, doc path).

consumed.description: Facts consumed by this event. These must have been previously produced by another task or event.

facts.description: Produced and consumed facts for this event. Tracks the fact-to-task protocol.

command.description: The validation command that was executed.

exitCode.description: Process exit code. 0 = pass, non-zero = fail.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the command in milliseconds.

validation.description: Validation command details for validation.pass and validation.fail events.

markerId.description: Machine-readable idempotency marker for the gate result.

gate.description: Gate result details for gate.pass and gate.block events.

meta.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for downstream analysis. Must not contain secrets, tokens, or raw log content.
